2026-02-13-huggingface-integration-core.title: Core HuggingFace Integration & GGUF Support
2026-02-13-huggingface-integration-core.summary: Implemented the foundation for HuggingFace model integration, including a dedicated scraper, GGUF metadata parser, and robust download manager.
items: - **Scraper Service**: Created `HuggingFaceService` for searching and fetching model metadata with local caching.
- **GGUF Parsing**: Added partial GGUF header parser to extract model architecture and context length.
- **Download Manager**: Implemented resumable downloads with SHA256 verification and real-time progress tracking.
- **Service Integration**: Wired `HuggingFaceService` into `ModelRegistryService` and `LLMService` via dependency injection.
- **Tests**: Updated comprehensive unit tests for `ModelRegistryService` and `LLMService` to ensure integration stability.

2026-02-13-ollama-abort-fix-and-chat-ref.title: Ollama Abort Fix & Chat Refactor
2026-02-13-ollama-abort-fix-and-chat-ref.summary: Fixed 'No handler registered for ollama:abort' error and refactored Ollama chat handlers to use the robust OllamaService.
items: - **IPC**: Added missing `ollama:abort` IPC handler to support cancellation of chat requests.
- **Refactor**: Updated `ollama:chat` and `ollama:chatStream` to use `OllamaService` instead of `LocalAIService` fallback, enabling true streaming and abort capabilities.
- **Tests**: Updated integration tests to verify abort functionality and mock `OllamaService` methods correctly.

2026-02-14-ui-chat-shimmer-animation.title: Chat Generation Shimmer Animation
2026-02-14-ui-chat-shimmer-animation.summary: Added a subtle shimmer animation to the chat title in the sidebar when the AI is generating a response.
items: - **UI**: Implemented `animate-text-shimmer` class for a premium loading effect.
- **Sidebar**: Applied the shimmer effect to the chat item label when `isGenerating` is true.

2026-02-14-marketplace-ui-error-handling.title: Marketplace UI Error Handling
2026-02-14-marketplace-ui-error-handling.summary: Added proper error handling and retry mechanism to the Model Marketplace grid.
items: - **UI**: Display user-friendly error message when model fetching fails.
- **UX**: Added a retry button to recover from transient network or service errors.

2026-02-14-error-fallback-enhancement.title: Enhanced Error Display
2026-02-14-error-fallback-enhancement.summary: Improved the application error screen to show detailed error messages and stack traces for better debugging.
items: - **Transparency**: Added detailed error message display instead of generic text.
- **Debugging**: Included collapsible stack trace for technical troubleshooting.
- **Usability**: Added 'Copy Details' button to easily share error information.
- **UX**: Automatic error state reset when navigating between different views.

2026-02-14-sd-cpp-binary-discovery-fix.title: SD-CPP Binary Discovery Fix
2026-02-14-sd-cpp-binary-discovery-fix.summary: Fixed an issue where the stable-diffusion.cpp executable could not be found after download due to naming convention differences.
items: - **Fix**: Added support for detecting `sd-cli.exe` and `stable-diffusion.exe` in addition to `sd.exe`.
- **Robustness**: Improved recursive binary discovery to handle various release structures.
- **Code Quality**: Removed forbidden `eslint-disable` comments and added strict service dependency checks.

2026-02-17-token-rotation-hardening-sec-.title: Token Rotation Hardening (SEC-001)
2026-02-17-token-rotation-hardening-sec-.summary: Implemented a robust token rotation mechanism with exponential backoff and proactive refresh buffers to prevent session timeouts.
items: - **TokenService (TS)**: Added 5-minute proactive refresh buffer and `withRetry` utility for exponential backoff on failures.
- **tandem-token-service (Rust)**: Hardened background refresh loop with retry logic and added `/health` endpoint.
- **Health Monitoring**: Implemented `getTokenHealth` API in TypeScript and Rust for real-time token status tracking.
- **Event Handling**: Added `token:permanent_failure` event to detect and handle revoked or expired credentials.
- **Verification**: Verified clean build, lint, and type-check across both components.
